name: Chick Flick
author: Poki
description: In Chick Flick, you play as a duo of squirrels trying to save the chicks falling from the trees! By moving your trampoline in place at the right time, you can bounce the chicks back up. If they land in the nest, they'll be save - if they land on the ground, you lose a life. Lose all your lives and it's game over! Can you save all the chicks? How to play Chick Flick? Use the mouse to place the trampoline and save the chickens! Who created Chick Flick? Chick Flick is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: canary, Sandman and Gunbrick How can I play Chick Flick for free? You can play Chick Flick for free on Poki. Can I play Chick Flick on mobile devices and desktop? Chick Flick can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
